claimText: TUM ProLehre guidance says students often need targeted training in competent AI use, including AI functions, limits, common errors, biases, misinformation, and critical evaluation of AI outputs.

citation.citationTitle: Entscheidungshilfe für den KI-Einsatz in der Lehre
